artifacts.name: Milestone Escrow · Contract Requirements v1.0
artifacts.content:
OBJECTIVE
Create a time-limited escrow that releases funds only after explicit payer approval and exposes a safe timeout refund path.

ROLES
Payer — initializes and funds the escrow; approves the milestone.
Recipient — receives funds after approval; cannot self-approve.

STATE MODEL
Created → Funded → Approved → Released
Funded → TimedOut → Refunded

INVARIANTS
Funds cannot be released before payer approval.
Refunds cannot execute before the deadline.
Terminal states cannot be executed twice.

artifacts.name: milestone_escrow.rs
Contract test report
artifacts.content:
PASS initializes_roles
PASS payer_can_approve
PASS release_after_approval
PASS reject_release_before_approval
PASS refund_after_timeout
PASS reject_early_refund
PASS reject_non_payer_approval
PASS prevent_double_release

REJECTED EDGE CASE
Recipient attempted release before payer approval — correctly rejected.

COVERAGE
94%

artifacts.name: Independent review
artifacts.content:
APPROVED Roles are explicit
APPROVED Release is approval-gated
APPROVED Timeout refund exists
APPROVED Success and failure paths covered
APPROVED No critical findings

FINAL RECOMMENDATION: APPROVED
